name: Human umbilical cord MSC-derived exosomes
summary: Human umbilical cord MSC-derived exosomes are normalized for dose-escalation osteoarthritis evidence in extracellular-vesicle therapy.
mechanism_summary: Delivers exosomes from human umbilical-cord mesenchymal stromal cells, with linked evidence bounded to local knee osteoarthritis outcomes.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: hUC-MSC exosome knee osteoarthritis dose-escalation pilot; hUC-MSC exosome osteoarthritis pilot showed uncontrolled dose signals.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
